proposals.title: [ARFC] rsETH Incident Funding Update
proposals.summary_en: This publication presents to the Aave community, for discussion and vote, a proposal to have the Aave DAO provide financial assistance to restore the backing of Kelp DAO’s rsETH product following the April 18, 2026, bridge incident.
proposals.summary_zh: [ARFC] rsETH事件资金更新提案：本提案提交Aave社区讨论和投票，建议Aave DAO向Kelp DAO的rsETH产品提供资金支持，以恢复其在2026年4月18日桥接事件后的抵押。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Pause AAVE Buybacks
proposals.summary_en: Following the rsETH bridge incident on April 18, 2026, AAVE buybacks have been paused since April 19, 2026. This ARFC formalises the pause and outlines the conditions under which the buyback cadence will be reassessed.
proposals.summary_zh: [ARFC] 自2026年4月18日rsETH桥接事件后，AAVE回购已自4月19日起暂停。此提案正式化暂停，并明确评估回购节奏的条件。

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Onboard USSD to Aave V3 Sonic Instance
proposals.summary_en: The current proposal is set to onboard Sonic stablecoin USSD to Aave V3 Sonic Instance.
proposals.summary_zh: 关于 Aave V3 Sonic 实例上线 Sonic 稳定币 USSD 的提案。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Continued Deprecation Steps of Aave V2 Markets
proposals.summary_en: Given the current state of the Aave V2 instance, Chaos Labs conducted a detailed evaluation of the oracle configurations and risk parameters across all listed assets. The objective of this analysis is to identify assets whose oracle setups and risk p
proposals.summary_zh:
[ARFC] Aave V2 市场逐步停用方案持续进行
鉴于 Aave V2 实例当前状态，Chaos Labs 对所有上市资产的 oracle 配置和风险参数进行了详细评估。分析目标为识别那些 oracle 设置和风险参数存在问题的资产。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Onboard PT-USDG-28MAY2026 to Aave V3 Core Instance
proposals.summary_en: This ARFC proposes to onboard PT-USDG-28MAY2026 to the Aave V3 Core Instance on Ethereum.
proposals.summary_zh: 关于在Aave V3核心实例中引入PT-USDG-28MAY2026的治理提案

proposals.title: [ARFC] Aave Will Win Framework
proposals.summary_en: Aave began with the thesis that decentralized lending could play a major role in traditional finance. Eight years later, that thesis has been validated.
proposals.summary_zh: Aave始于去中心化借贷在传统金融中扮演重要角色的论断。八年后，这一论断得到证实。

proposals.title: [ARFC] sGHO Launch Configuration
proposals.summary_en: This publication provides an overview of the new native on-chain yield-accruing sGHO savings product upgrade. Within, we define the initial parameter configuration, present the migration process from the current sGHO (stkGHO rebranded), and introduce
proposals.summary_zh: [ARFC] sGHO上线配置概览。介绍新原生链上收益累积的sGHO储蓄产品升级，定义初始参数配置，展示从当前sGHO（stkGHO更名）的迁移流程，并引入相关治理细节。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Update Signers and SAFE Configuration March 2026
proposals.summary_en: This publication proposes updates to the Budget SAFE signer configuration to improve transaction execution reliability, signer availability, and operational efficiency.
proposals.summary_zh: This publication proposes updates to the Budget SAFE signer configuration to improve transaction execution reliability, signer availability, and operational efficiency.

proposals.title: [ARFC] Aave V4 Licensing
proposals.summary_en: This proposal introduces a two-part licensing framework for the canonical Aave V4 repositories: a BUSL-based license for the core codebase, and a Contributor License Agreement (CLA) for anyone who wants to contribute to the codebase. The goal is to p
proposals.summary_zh: [ARFC] Aave V4 许可框架提案：引入基于BUSL的核心代码许可和针对贡献者的贡献者许可协议（CLA），旨在规范Aave V4代码库的许可和贡献管理。

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Onboard USSD to Aave V3 Sonic Instance
proposals.summary_en: The current proposal is set to onboard Sonic stablecoin USSD to Aave V3 Sonic Instance.
proposals.summary_zh:
提案：Aave
标题：[TEMP CHECK] 将USSD稳定币引入Aave V3 Sonic实例
摘要：本提案计划于2023年X月X日将USSD稳定币加入Aave V3 Sonic实例。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Bug Bounty Program on Sherlock
proposals.summary_en: Aave Labs proposes launching a dedicated Aave V4 bug bounty program on the Sherlock platform. The objective is to add an always-on security reporting channel for Aave V4, with a triage setup designed to reduce spam and route high-severity reports wit
proposals.summary_zh: Aave Labs拟在Sherlock平台启动专门的Aave V4漏洞赏金计划。旨在为Aave V4提供持续的漏洞报告渠道，并建立分级机制以减少垃圾信息，并优先处理严重漏洞报告。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Aave V4 Activation on Ethereum Mainnet
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks community approval to deploy Aave V4 to Ethereum Mainnet through a security-first initial setup with conservative risk parameters and a deliberately narrow Hub and Spoke configuration. Aave V4 introduces a modular architecture whe
proposals.summary_zh:
[ARFC] Aave V4于以太坊主网激活提案
本提案旨在获得社区批准，将Aave V4部署至以太坊主网，通过以安全为首要原则的初始设置，采用保守的风险参数和故意狭窄的枢纽-辐条配置。Aave V4引入模块化架构，...

proposals.title: [ARFC] Aave <> Chainlink SVR. Multi-network expansion
proposals.summary_en: Proposal to expand the Aave/Chainlink SVR system to Aave v3 Base and Arbitrum.
proposals.summary_zh: [ARFC] Aave/Chainlink SVR系统扩展提案，将Aave v3 Base和Arbitrum纳入多网络。

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Aave V4 Licensing
proposals.summary_en: This proposal introduces a two-part licensing framework for the canonical Aave V4 repositories: a BUSL–based license for the core codebase, and a Contributor License Agreement (CLA) for anyone who wants to contribute to the codebase. The goal is to p
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案为 Aave V4 代码库引入双重许可框架：核心代码采用 BUSL 商业许可证保护知识产权，贡献者需签署 CLA（贡献者许可协议）。目标是在保护协议 IP 的同时规范社区贡献流程。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Buyback Program - Budget Adjustment
proposals.summary_en: This publication proposes reducing the annual AAVE buyback budget from approximately $50M to $30M ad outlined in the Aave DAO Funding Insights forum post.
proposals.summary_zh: 提案建议将 AAVE 年度回购预算从约 5000 万美元削减至 3000 万美元（削减 40%），依据 Aave DAO 资金洞察分析，旨在优化协议资金使用效率。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Aave 提议将年回购预算砍掉 40% 至 $3000 万，直接削弱了 AAVE 的通缩力度与质押收益预期。

鉴于借款费用收入较峰值下滑 25%（1 月仅 $7.95M），Aave DAO 不得不将年回购预算从 $5000 万缩减至 $3000 万以缓解财政压力。虽然年收入仍有 $1.22 亿，但回购占比的显著下降意味着 TEV Yield（当前 4.49%）将面临缩水，AAVE 作为“生息资产”的叙事逻辑短期受损。若节省的资金未能有效转化为生态增长动力，这种“节流”策略恐将打击长期持有者的信心，需警惕市场对收益预期下调的重新定价。

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Aave V4 Bug Bounty Program on Sherlock
proposals.summary_en: Aave Labs proposes launching a dedicated Aave V4 bug bounty program on the Sherlock platform. The objective is to add an always-on security reporting channel for Aave V4, with a triage setup designed to reduce spam and route high-severity reports wit
proposals.summary_zh: Aave Labs 提议在 Sherlock 平台为 Aave V4 启动专属漏洞赏金计划，建立 7×24 安全报告渠道，通过分级筛选减少垃圾报告并优先处理高危漏洞。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Safety Module - Reduce  Emissions
proposals.summary_en: The publication proposes implementing the AAVE Emission reduction as presented in the Aave DAO Funding Insights forum post.
proposals.summary_zh: 提案建议削减 Safety Module 的 AAVE 代币排放量，依据 Aave DAO 资金洞察论坛的分析，通过降低排放减少代币通胀压力。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Aave 拟削减 Safety Module 排放，巩固代币净通缩优势。

Aave DAO 提议削减 Safety Module 排放，旨在延续当前强劲的净收购态势。数据显示，回购计划不到一年

proposals.title: [ARFC] Deploy Aave v3 on X Layer
proposals.summary_en: This ARFC proposes the deployment of an Aave v3 Instance on X Layer.
proposals.summary_zh: 本 ARFC 提案建议在 X Layer（OKX 生态 L2）上部署 Aave v3 借贷实例，扩展协议的多链覆盖。

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Deploy Aave Protocol on Monad
proposals.summary_en: This TEMP CHECK seeks the community’s input on deploying the Aave Protocol on Monad, a fully EVM-compatible, high-throughput network well-suited to supporting high-frequency DeFi applications.
proposals.summary_zh: 温度检查提案，征求社区对在 Monad 上部署 Aave 协议的意见。Monad 是完全 EVM 兼容的高吞吐量 L1 网络，适合支持高频 DeFi 应用场景。

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Aave Will Win Framework
proposals.summary_en: Aave began with the thesis that decentralized lending could play a major role in traditional finance. Eight years later, that thesis has been validated.
proposals.summary_zh: 「Aave Will Win」框架提案，回顾 Aave 八年发展历程，验证去中心化借贷在传统金融中的重要地位，并提出未来战略方向。

proposals.title: [ARFC] Aave v3.7 candidate
proposals.summary_en: Proposal for the pre-approval of Aave v3.7, to authorise security procedures before the final on-chain AIP activation vote.
proposals.summary_zh: 预批准 Aave v3.7 版本升级的提案，在最终链上 AIP 激活投票前先授权完成安全审计流程，确保升级安全性。

proposals.title: [RFC] Governance Process Upgrade: Establishing a Statute of Limitations for Temperature Checks
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks to establish a formal "Statute of Limitations" for Uniswap Governance proposals. Specifically, it mandates that any proposal which passes a "Temperature Check" (Snapshot vote) must proceed to an on-chain vote within 90 days.
proposals.summary_zh: 为 Uniswap 治理设立「时效性」规则：通过温度检查（Snapshot 投票）的提案必须在 90 天内推进至链上投票，否则过期失效，防止提案无限期搁置。

proposals.title: [Temp Check] Protocol Fee Expansion: Eight More Chains and Remaining Mainnet V3 Pools
proposals.summary_en: to use the new governance process_ _approved_ _in UNIfication. The new process only applies to fee parameter updates, where proposals can bypass the RFC stage and go directly to a five-day Snapshot followed by an onchain vote.
proposals.summary_zh: 将协议费用扩展至另外八条链及 Mainnet V3 剩余池。采用 UNIfication 批准的新治理流程——费用参数更新可跳过 RFC 阶段，直接进行五天 Snapshot 投票后链上投票。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Uniswap 启用新治理流程加速费率扩张，协议费覆盖范围显著扩大。

Uniswap 提议将协议费扩展至 8 条新链及主网剩余 V3 池，并首次应用 UNIfication 治理新规，跳过 RFC 阶段直接进入 Snapshot 投票，显著提升了治理效率。此举打破了过往费率调整的僵局，若费率开关全面开启，配合当前 $3.33B 的 TVL，有望显著提升协议收入并增厚 TEV Yield（现报 1.47%）。虽然新

proposals.title: Strategic Renewal of Gnosis, Linea, and Mantle Deployments
proposals.summary_en: on the forum this summer and has been hoping that the quorum/delegation situation would improve. It seems to have improved thanks to the Unification initiative.
proposals.summary_zh: 战略性续期 Gnosis、Linea 和 Mantle 三条链上的 Uniswap 部署。得益于 Unification 倡议，法定人数和委托参与率已有改善。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Uniswap 拟重启 Gnosis、Linea 及 Mantle 三条过期部署，借治理激活修复协议版图。

GFX Labs 提议续期 Linea、Mantle 和 Gnosis 三个已过期的 V3 部署，旨在利用 Uni-fication 倡议带来的委托改善契机，解决此前因法定人数不足导致的治理瘫痪。其中 Mantle 拥有 $325M 的 TVL 且即将上线 Aave，战略价值显著，放弃将直接导致市场份额流失。此举不仅修复了协议覆盖范围，也为未来通过 Firepit 销毁机制捕获 TEV 收益奠定了基础，是治理复苏后的务实扩张，避免了因行政停滞造成的生态萎缩。

proposals.title: UNIfication
proposals.summary_en: Uniswap Labs and the Uniswap Foundation have created a joint proposal that activates the protocol fee and aligns incentives across the Uniswap ecosystem.
proposals.summary_zh: Uniswap Labs 和 Uniswap Foundation 联合提案「UNIfication」，激活协议费用开关并在整个 Uniswap 生态中统一激励机制，是 Uniswap 收入机制的里程碑事件。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Uniswap 协议费激活叠加 Unichain 收入销毁，UNI 正式开启价值捕获模式。

Uniswap Labs 与 Foundation 联合提案激活 Protocol Fee，并将 Unichain Sequencer 收入注入 Firepit 销毁 UNI，彻底打通了价值闭环。面对 $3.33B 的 TVL 和 $2.39B 市值，此举将协议收入直接转化为代币通缩动力，让 TEV Yield 从理论走向现实。这不仅解决了长期以来的“价值捕获缺失”痛点，更通过 Unichain 生态扩张将 Layer2 收益回馈持币者，实现了 Labs 与 DAO 的利益深度绑定，是对 UNI 估值模型的重构，极具里程碑意义。

proposals.title: Grow Uniswap on Plasma
proposals.summary_en: Voting Options: Allocate $250k, Don’t Allocate, Abstain
proposals.summary_zh: 关于是否在 Plasma 网络上扩展 Uniswap 的投票。选项：分配 25 万美元用于激励、不分配、弃权。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Uniswap 拟动用国库 $250k 激励 Plasma 链扩张，联手 UAC 预算总激励达 $500k。

Uniswap DAO 正就向 Plasma 部署提供 $250k 国库激励进行投票，若通过，叠加 UAC 已承诺的 $250k 自由预算，总激励规模将达 $500k。此举旨在通过真金白银推动 Uniswap 在 Plasma 生态的早期扩张，抢占流动性先机。虽然金额相对 Uniswap 体量较小，但这标志着 DAO 正积极利用资金杠杆撬动新兴链市场份额，不过需警惕激励期过后的流动性留存问题，毕竟单纯的补贴难以构建长期的护城河，关键在于能否形成可持续的交易深度。

proposals.title: GLI — Incentivized Delegation Vaults
proposals.summary_en: Incentivized Delegation Vaults: Multiple delegates recognized that it is not healthy for the governance ecosystem if the entirety of the votable supply is sustained by treasury delegations alone. As such, encouraging community delegations is essentia
proposals.summary_zh: 提出激励型委托金库方案。多位代表认为仅依靠国库委托维持全部可投票供应不健康，需鼓励社区主动委托以提升治理去中心化。

proposals.title: GLI — Treasury delegation Round 2
proposals.summary_en: Treasury delegations have received nearly universal support, given their direct method of addressing the votable supply shortfall and proven historical precedent and track record. In fact, today, half of the remaining votable supply is directly sourc
proposals.summary_zh: Uniswap 国库委托第二轮提案，直接解决可投票供应不足问题。当前约一半可投票供应已来源于国库委托，该机制已有成功先例。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Uniswap 推进国库授权第二轮，旨在化解可投票供应短缺引发的治理瘫痪风险。

UAC 识别出可投票供应量仅剩约 4100 万 UNI，逼近 4000 万 UNI 的法定人数红线，治理面临系统性风险。GLI 提案通过国库授权直接填补缺口，鉴于目前半数可投票供应源于此机制，此举不仅是解决供应短缺的最直接手段，更是维持 DAO 正常运转的“救命稻草”。虽然这是对国库资金的被动利用，但在治理参与度低迷的背景下，通过授权将“沉睡资产”转化为治理动能，是防止决策瘫痪的必要之举。

proposals.title: Launching Uniswap v3 on Ronin with co-incentives
proposals.summary_en: This proposal advocates for an official UniswapV3 deployment on Ronin along with a co-incentivization campaign to establish UniswapV3 as a primary DEX in the Ronin Ecosystem.
proposals.summary_zh: 提案在 Ronin（Axie Infinity 生态链）上正式部署 UniswapV3，并通过联合激励活动使其成为 Ronin 生态主要 DEX。

proposals.title: Establish Uniswap Governance as “DUNI,” a Wyoming DUNA
proposals.summary_en: The Uniswap Foundation (“UF”) proposes that Uniswap Governance adopt a Wyoming-registered Decentralized Unincorporated Nonprofit Association (“DUNA”) as the legal structure for the Uniswap Governance Protocol. This new legal entity, called “DUNI”, wi
proposals.summary_zh: Uniswap Foundation 提议采用怀俄明州 DUNA（去中心化非法人非营利协会）作为 Uniswap 治理协议的法律实体，命名为「DUNI」，为 DAO 提供法律保护。

proposals.title: Uniswap Delegate Reward Initiative - Cycle 4
proposals.summary_en: This proposal outlines the Uniswap Delegate Reward Initiative—Cycle 4, a compensation program designed to improve and sustain the participation quality and dedication among Uniswap delegates following the conclusion of Cycle 1, 2, and 3.
proposals.summary_zh: Uniswap 委托人奖励计划第四期，延续前三期成果，通过补偿机制提升委托人参与治理的质量和投入度。

proposals.title: Uniswap Unichain - USDS and sUSDS Co-Incentives Growth Management Plan
proposals.summary_en: Unichain is currently the main focus of Uniswap’s growth strategy, presenting a significant opportunity for collaborative growth. The launch of USDS and sUSDS opens doors for close collaboration among two of the premier DeFi protocols Uniswap and Sky
proposals.summary_zh: Unichain 是 Uniswap 增长战略核心。USDS 和 sUSDS 的上线为 Uniswap 与 Sky（MakerDAO）两大 DeFi 协议在 Unichain 上的深度合作开辟机会。

proposals.title: Four Chains for Analytics Hub for Uniswap’s Revitalization and Growth Program
proposals.summary_en: is for chain selection feedback for the ongoing proposal.
proposals.summary_zh: 为 Uniswap 振兴与增长计划中的分析中心选定四条目标链的反馈投票。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Uniswap 振兴计划启动四链筛选，Unichain 仅作兴趣测试不计入最终名额。

Uniswap DAO 推进“Analytics Hub 振兴计划”，旨在通过 Snapshot 投票选出 4 条目标链以集中资源。值得玩味的是，Unichain 虽被列入选项以测试社区热度，但即便进入前四也会被“跳过”，名额顺延给下一条链。这种“只看不算”的机制设计，暗示了 Uniswap 对自家 L2 有着独立且更宏大的激励规划，不愿在此处挤占其他生态的资源和曝光，体现了 DAO 在资源分配上的精细化管理，避免了“既得利益者”通吃局面，确保了多链扩张的公平性。

proposals.title: [Temp Check] Analytics Hub for Uniswap’s Revitalization and Growth Program
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks to utilize Forse to help analyze the effectiveness of the four other chains the Uniswap community chooses as part of the Uniswap Revitalization and Growth Program.
proposals.summary_zh: 提案利用 Forse 分析工具，评估 Uniswap 振兴与增长计划中社区选择的四条链上的部署效果。

proposals.title: [TEMP CHECK] Scaling V4 and Supporting Unichain
proposals.summary_en: passing. Post launch, Oku will continue to improve the V4 interface and iterate based on feedback.
proposals.summary_zh: 支持 Oku 团队开发 Uniswap V4 前端界面和 Unichain 生态工具。通过后 Oku 将持续优化 V4 界面并根据反馈迭代。

proposals.title: [Temp Check/Revised] Treasury Delegation Round 2
proposals.summary_en: We propose allocating up to 15 million UNI of total amount as the treasury delegation, distributing into selected delegates.
proposals.summary_zh: 提议分配最多 1500 万 UNI 作为国库委托总量，分配给选定的委托人以增强治理参与度和可投票供应。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Uniswap 拟委托 1500 万 UNI 助力代表，治理格局或迎结构性优化。

Uniswap DAO 推出国库委托第二轮提案，计划分配高达 1500 万 UNI 给选定的代表，旨在打破治理僵局。相比初版，此次修订版将总额缩减并引入 Election Snapshot 机制筛选“杰出”代表，显示出对治理权力分配的审慎态度。虽然短期委托期限限制了代表的长期控制权，但承诺在 Unistaker 实施等重大变局时重新评估，体现了灵活应变的治理智慧。此举若能落实，将有效激活沉睡的治理代币，提升决策效率，但需警惕大户通过委托过度集中投票权的风险。

proposals.title: Staker-Driven Trading Fee Discounts & Performance-Based Leaderboard Incentives
proposals.summary_en: This proposal introduces a staker-aligned incentive system combining.

proposals.analysis_zh:
GMX 提案通过最高 90% 手续费折扣与排行榜激励，试图将交易者转化为质押者以锁定流动性并提升交易量。

GMX 当前 TEV Yield 高达 28.9%，年 TEV 分配 $19.8M 占据年收入 $22.0M 的绝大部分，这种高补贴模式急需更强的用户粘性支撑。提案引入最高 90% 的交易费折扣及基于绩效的排行榜激励，旨在打破交易者与质押者之间的隔阂，将高频交易需求转化为对 GMX 的持币动力。虽然 TVL 已达 $271.7M，但单纯依靠回购分红难以持续，此举若能有效将交易量与质押深度绑定，将优化收入结构并降低抛压，是对现有高收益模型的一次关键修正。

proposals.summary_zh: 申请拨款 315 万美元至 GMX 控制的多签钱包，用于在 Arbitrum、Avalanche、BNB Chain 等链上执行交易者导向的营销和激励计划。

proposals.title: GMX Solana Expansion Monthly GT Token Treasury Swap
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks the GMX DAO’s approval for a recurring monthly treasury swap to support the ongoing expansion of GMX Solana. Under the proposed terms, the GMX DAO would purchase $110,000 worth of GT tokens from GMX Solana each month, for 12 month
proposals.summary_zh: GMX DAO 批准每月定期国库互换以支持 GMX Solana 扩展——每月购买 11 万美元 GT 代币，持续 12 个月，总计 132 万美元。
proposals.analysis_zh:
GMX 拟年耗资 $132 万购入 GT 代币支持 Solana 扩张，以财政支出换取生态增长潜力。

GMX DAO 提议每月斥资 $110,000 购买 GMX Solana 的 GT 代币，为期 12 个月，总计投入 $132 万。尽管 GMX 当前年收入高达 $22.0M 且 TEV Yield 维持在 28.9% 的高位，但这笔支出仅占年收入的约 6%，财务负担极低。此举实质上是利用主协议的现金流孵化新生态，将财政资金转化为对 Sol

proposals.title: Deployment of Surplus Funds in the Price Impact Buckets into the DAO Treasury
proposals.summary_en: recommends transferring to the GMX DAO Treasury the accumulated Price Impact Buckets from the GM pools that are in surplus to their isolated risk requirements. This reallocation will allow for both better functioning of the pools and ensure that fund
proposals.summary_zh: 建议将 GM 池中超出独立风险要求的盈余 Price Impact Buckets 转入 GMX DAO 国库，既优化池运作效率又确保资金不闲置。
proposals.analysis_zh:
GMX 提议将 Price Impact Buckets 盈余转入国库，盘活闲置资金并优化资金池运作。

GMX V2.2 部署后，DAO 提议将 GM Pools 中超出隔离风险要求的 Price Impact Buckets 盈余资金转移至国库。当前 TVL 达 $271.7M，年收入 $22.0M，盘活这部分闲置资金不仅能优化资金池运作机制，还能让 DAO 更灵活地调配资源应对潜在风险或支持生态发展。此举体现了协议在风险管理与资金效率间的平衡，避免了资金在 Bucket 中的无效沉淀，虽然不直接影响高达 28.9% 的 TEV Yield，但增强了国库的财务健康度，属于精细化运营的积极信号。

proposals.title: Distribution plan for Recovered Funds from Arbitrum GLP
proposals.summary_en: We would like to thank the community and delegates for their input into the Resolve the Distribution Plan for the Recovered Funds from Arbitrum GLP discussion.
proposals.summary_zh: Arbitrum GLP 追回资金分配方案的社区讨论结果投票。感谢社区和代表的参与贡献。
proposals.analysis_zh:
GMX 拟归还 Arbitrum GLP 漏洞追回资金，全额补偿受损用户以修复信任危机。

GMX DAO 提议将 Arbitrum GMX V1 漏洞事件中追回的资金分配给受损的 GLP 持有者，资金已转入 Security Committee multi-sig。尽管协议当前 TEV Yield 高达 28.9%，年 TEV 分配近 $19.8M，展现了强劲的现金流造血能力，但妥善解决历史安全事件赔偿是维护品牌信誉的基石。此举不仅兑现了对用户的承诺，更向市场传递了 DAO 治理负责任的积极信号，有助于稳固 $271.7M 的 TVL 基本盘，防止因信任危机引发的流动性恐慌，为长期生态发展扫清障碍。

proposals.summary_en: advocates for a revised fee structure: 50% to LPs, 25% to GMX stakers, and a 25% allocation to the Treasury. Half of this Treasury allocation (12.5% of total fees) will be actively deployed for targeted Marketing and Growth Incentives on Botanix.
proposals.summary_zh: 为 GMX 在 Botanix（比特币 L2）的部署修订费用结构：50% 给 LP、25% 给 GMX 质押者、25% 给国库。国库中 12.5% 用于 Botanix 营销激励。
proposals.analysis_zh:
GMX 提议在 Botanix 部署中调整费用结构，划拨 12.5% 手续费用于生态激励，短期或稀释质押收益。

提案建议在 Botanix

proposals.title: GMXSOL Trading Competition
proposals.summary_en: We are excited to launch a new multi-round trading competition program on GMXSOL, aiming to incentivize trading activity and provide a reference model for trading-based rewards on GMX.
proposals.summary_zh: 在 GMXSOL（GMX Solana 版本）上启动多轮交易竞赛计划，激励交易活动并为 GMX 基于交易量的奖励机制提供参考模式。
proposals.analysis_zh:
GMX 拟启动 GMXSOL 交易竞赛以刺激交易量，探索基于交易量的激励模型。

GMX DAO 提议在 GMXSOL 上开启多轮交易竞赛，试图通过激励措施提升交易活跃度并建立新的奖励范式。当前 GMX 年收入高达 $22.0M，其中 $19.8M 用于回购分红，造就了惊人的 28.9% TEV Yield，这种高回报虽然吸引质押者，但协议似乎正试图打破过度依赖存量分配的局面。此次竞赛若将部分奖励导向活跃交易者，虽可能短期稀释质押收益，但有望盘活 $271.7M TVL 的资金效率，推动协议从单一的“分红机器”向高活跃度的交易枢纽转型，是平衡短期收益与长期生态增长的关键博弈。

GMX 提议在 Spiderchain 部署 V2，旨在利用其 $

proposals.title: Decentralization of Fee Distribution Process
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks to decentralize and automate the entire fee distribution process for the GMX ecosystem. Currently, fees are manually withdrawn from contracts, followed by a script-based distribution to GLP, keepers, reward distributors, and the t
proposals.summary_zh: 提议将 GMX 生态的整个费用分配流程去中心化并自动化。当前费用需手动提取再脚本分配给 GLP、keeper、奖励分发者和国库，效率低且有中心化风险。
proposals.analysis_zh:
GMX 拟将费用分配全面上链自动化，消除手动干预风险并提升透明度。

GMX 提议将费用分配流程从“手动提取+脚本分发”升级为智能合约自动执行的链上模式，直击当前中心化操作的低效与透明度痛点。鉴于 GMX 年收入高达 $22.0M，其中 $19.8M 用于 TEV 分配，如此庞大的资金流长期依赖人工操作实属隐患。此次升级若通过，不仅能确保 TVL $271.7M 背后的收益分配更精准高效，还能消除单点故障风险，是项目走向成熟去中心化治理的关键一步，对质押者而言是显著的安全红利。

proposals.title: Administration of Protocol Owned Liquidity
proposals.summary_en: The GMX DAO currently holds outstanding pool fees amounting to 994.70 ETH (3.2m USD) and 69,132.83 GMX (1.6m USD) from its GMX/ETH Uniswap LP position. This proposal seeks to authorize GMX DAO to collect these outstanding position fees from Uniswap a
proposals.summary_zh: GMX DAO 的 Uniswap LP 头寸累积了 994.70 ETH（320 万美元）和 69,132.83 GMX（160 万美元）的未提取费用，提案授权 DAO 领取这些费用。
proposals.analysis_zh:
GMX 拟收回 Uniswap 上 $480 万未领费用并迁移 POL 至 Timelock，强化资金安全与流动性部署。

提案计划收取 GMX/ETH Uniswap LP 头寸中累积的 994.70 ETH（约 $3.2m）及 69,132.83 GMX（约 $1.6m），总价值近 $480 万，同时将 21 个 POL NFTs 移入 DAO Timelock Contract。此举将单一托管转为时间锁合约，显著降低了资金托管风险，展现了 DAO 对资产安全的重视。收回资金将用于增强 CEX 与链上流动性并支持 GLV 资产组合，这对 TVL 达 $271.7m 的协议而言是高效的资本再分配，能有效提升资金利用率与市场深度，属于典型的存量优化策略。

proposals.title: Proposal to Retain Stablecoin Fees From Stablecoin Pools
proposals.summary_en: The Kitchen proposes that all Treasury-bound protocol fees arising from major stablecoin pools on PancakeSwap be retained in stablecoins, instead of being converted into CAKE.
proposals.summary_zh: Kitchen 提议将 PancakeSwap 主要稳定币池产生的协议费用以稳定币形式保留在国库中，而非转换为 CAKE 代币，提升国库资产稳定性。
proposals.analysis_zh:
PancakeSwap 提案拟停止将稳定币池收入换成 CAKE，直接削弱回购买盘力量。

PancakeSwap 年收入达 $110.9M，TEV Yield 高达 13.39%，目前协议收入的 15% 用于 CAKE 回购销毁，这本是支撑代币价格的核心动力。然而，The Kitchen 提议将主要稳定币池的国库收入直接保留为稳定币，不再转换为 CAKE。虽然此举能避免国库为支付运营成本而“高买低卖”造成的资金损耗，提高资金效率，但实质上切断了部分“买入”流动性。在 CAKE 市值 $480.4M 的背景下，减少回购买盘可能削弱通缩叙事，短期对价格支撑力度存疑，需警惕市场对“利好出

proposals.title: Proposal to Reduce CAKE Token Max Supply
proposals.summary_en: 3.0, which retired the veCAKE model and reduced CAKE emissions from ~40,000 to ~22,250 per day.
proposals.summary_zh: 提议削减 CAKE 最大供应量。Tokenomics 3.0 已废除 veCAKE 模型并将每日排放从约 40,000 降至约 22,250 CAKE。
proposals.analysis_zh:
CAKE 代币经济学改革成效显著，年净销毁 8.19% 强化通缩叙事。

PancakeSwap 通过 CAKE Tokenomics Proposal 3.0 激进改革，淘汰 veCAKE 模型并将日排放量从 40,000 大幅削减至 22,250。这一举措直接导致 2025 年实现 8.19% 的净销毁，代币供应量从年初 380M 降至 350M，延续了自 2023 年 9 月以来的通缩趋势。虽然放弃 veCAKE 分红可能削弱部分治理激励，但结合年收入 $110.

proposals.analysis_zh:
CAKE 经济学大改：废除 veCAKE 与质押，确立 4% 年通缩目标

PancakeSwap 提案 3.0 彻底重构代币经济学，废除 veCAKE 和 Gauges Voting 系统，并解锁所有质押 CAKE，结束复杂的“贿选”时代。虽然当前 $111.0M 年收入和 6.33% 的 TEV Yield 具有吸引力，但改革旨在牺牲短期质押收益换取长期价值，目标实现约 4% 的年通缩率并在 2030 年前减少 20% 供应量。这一激进转型将治理权归还给持有者，消除了流动性挖矿的摩擦，尽管大量解锁可能带来短期抛压，但明确的通缩预期若能配合收入回购执行，将显著提升 CAKE 的资产质量。

proposals.title: Make iCake transferred or rented
proposals.summary_en: Many iCake holders don't spend even 10% of them on IFOs I suggest making it possible to rent them out for % commissions.
proposals.summary_zh: 社区建议：许多 iCake 持有者在 IFO 中使用不到 10%，提议允许将闲置 iCake 出租给其他用户以赚取佣金收益。

proposals.title: Proposal to Relabel Multichain Warchest as Ecosystem Growth
proposals.summary_en: We propose to relabel the current Multichain Warchest allocation as Ecosystem Growth to expand its scope. This allows us to provide incentives for PancakeSwap’s upcoming products and initiatives like PancakeSwap v4, for which we propose to establish
proposals.summary_zh: 提议将「多链战备金」重命名为「生态增长」并扩大使用范围，为 PancakeSwap v4 等新产品提供激励资金支持。

proposals.title: (UPDATED) Proposal for Lista DAO ($LISTA) IFO to be Hosted on PancakeSwap
proposals.summary_en:
- Lista DAO is a liquid staking and decentralized stablecoin protocol
- Users can liquid stake their BNB to receive slisBNB, and borrow lisUSD against accepted collateral assets
- PancakeSquad NFT holders and point holders (≥ 1500 points) are eligibl
proposals.summary_zh: Lista DAO（流动性质押+去中心化稳定币协议）IFO 在 PancakeSwap 上线。用户可质押 BNB 获 slisBNB 并借 lisUSD。PancakeSquad NFT 和积分≥1500 的持有者有资格参与。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Lista DAO IFO 登陆 PancakeSwap，零费用参与利好社区，或刺激 CAKE 短期锁仓需求。

PancakeSwap 拟托管 Lista DAO IFO，引入 BNB Chain 头部 Liquid Staking 与稳定币协议。此次 IFO 设定为 0% 参与费用，其中 10% 额度面向 PancakeSquad NFT 及积分持有者私募，剩余 90% 开放公募，这种分配虽照顾核心社区但门槛对普通用户略显苛刻。结合 PancakeSwap 当前 $2.10B 的 TVL 和 13.39% 的 TEV Yield，引入 Lista DAO 有望丰富资产多样性，但考虑到协议年收入 $110.9M 中仅 15% 用于回购销毁，单纯依靠 IFO 热度难以根本改变 CAKE 的价值捕获逻辑，短期情绪提振大于实质基本面改善。

proposals.title: Proposal for Lista DAO ($LISTA) IFO to be Hosted on PancakeSwap
proposals.summary_en:
- Lista DAO is a liquid staking and decentralized stablecoin protocol
- Users can liquid stake their BNB to receive slisBNB, and borrow lisUSD against accepted collateral assets
- PancakeSquad NFT holders and point holders (≥ 1500 points) are eligibl
proposals.summary_zh: Lista DAO（流动性质押+去中心化稳定币协议）IFO 在 PancakeSwap 上线。用户可质押 BNB 获 slisBNB 并借 lisUSD。PancakeSquad NFT 和积分≥1500 的持有者有资格参与。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Lista DAO IFO 登陆 PancakeSwap，零费用参与利好社区，短期刺激平台活跃度。

PancakeSwap 拟举办 Lista DAO IFO，作为 BNB Chain 上流动性质押与稳定币协议，Lista DAO 允许用户质押 BNB 获取 slisBNB 并借出 lisUSD。此次 IFO 设 0% 参与费，90% 额度面向公募，仅 10% 留给 NFT 及积分持有者私募，极大降低了散户参与门槛。虽然 PancakeSwap 当前 TVL 达 $2.10B，TEV Yield 高达 13.39%，但协议收入仅 15% 用于 CAKE 回购销毁，IFO 本身并不直接增加回购资金。此举更多是提振生态活跃度与 IFO 板块热度，对 CAKE 的价值捕获仍需依赖底层交易量的持续增长，而非一次性融资活动。

proposals.title: Proposal to Direct CAKE Emissions to Locker Protocols
proposals.summary_en: Redirection of CAKE Emissions to Bribes.
proposals.summary_zh: 提议将 CAKE 排放从直接分配改为通过 Bribes（贿赂）机制重定向，让 veCake 投票者引导排放去向，提升资本效率。
proposals.analysis_zh:
CAKE 排放量转向 Bribes 激励 veCAKE 锁仓，旨在提升激励效率而非增加通胀。

PancakeSwap 坐拥 $2.10B TVL 与 $110.9M 年收入，在维持 15% 收入回购销毁的基础上，The Kitchen 提议将部分 CAKE 排放量转向 Bribes 以引导 veCAKE 生态。此举关键在于“不新增通胀”，而是重新分配现有激励至 BNB-USDT 等高收益池，旨在解决激励效率

proposals.title: Proposal to recognize Mancake as an affiliate DEX on Mantle Network
proposals.summary_en: to recognize Mancake as an affiliate DEX.
proposals.summary_zh: 正式承认 Mancake 为 PancakeSwap 在 Mantle Network 上的关联 DEX。

proposals.title: Proposal to Launch veCAKE on opBNB
proposals.summary_en: Here’s a quick recap of veCAKE’s utility:.
proposals.summary_zh: 提议在 opBNB 上线 veCAKE 功能，扩展 PancakeSwap 治理机制至 BNB 的 L2 网络。

proposals.title: Proposal to Launch veCAKE on Base
proposals.summary_en: Here’s a quick recap of veCAKE’s utility:.
proposals.summary_zh: 提议在 Base 链上线 veCAKE 功能，扩展 PancakeSwap 跨链治理覆盖。

proposals.title: Authorize Lido EarnETH Loss Coverage Below 1% Threshold For The Kelp Incident
proposals.summary_en: Lido Earn contributors request DAO authorization to use the Lido Earn first-loss mechanism to cover Kelp-related losses incurred by Lido EarnETH users, even if such losses are below the previously approved 1% threshold. This is a one-off, Kelp-specif
proposals.summary_zh: Lido协议：授权Lido Earn对Kelp事件造成的ETH损失低于1%阈值的赔偿。Lido Earn出资者请求DAO授权使用Lido Earn的第一损失机制，覆盖Lido EarnETH用户因Kelp相关损失，即使该损失低于之前批准的1%阈值。这是一次性、针对Kelp特定事件的赔偿。

proposals.title: Mystery Box | LIDO x Snapshot
proposals.summary_en: We are officially announcing the launch of Lido Finance Mystery Boxes with Snapshot support!
proposals.summary_zh: 我们正式宣布，Lido Finance 与 Snapshot 支持的神秘盒子（Mystery Boxes）即将上线！

proposals.title: Mystery Box | LIDO x Snapshot
proposals.summary_en: We are officially announcing the launch of Lido Finance Mystery Boxes with Snapshot support!
proposals.summary_zh: Lido与Snapshot合作，正式推出Lido Finance Mystery Boxes！

proposals.title: Authorize LDO Accumulation Program for up to 10,000 stETH
proposals.summary_en: The proposal seeks to authorize the Lido Growth Committee to execute a one-time LDO accumulation program using up to 10,000 stETH from the Lido DAO Treasury.
proposals.summary_zh:
协议：Lido
标题：授权LDO累积计划至10,000 stETH
摘要：提案旨在授权Lido增长委员会使用至10,000 stETH执行一次性的LDO累积计划，资金来源于Lido DAO财务库。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Lido 国库斥资 10,000 stETH 回购 LDO，打破治理代币零收益僵局

Lido DAO 提议授权 Lido Growth Committee 动用国库中 10,000 stETH 执行 LDO 积累计划，由 Lido Ecosystem Foundation 协助分批落地。尽管协议年收入高达 $78.6M 且 TVL 稳居 $18.99B，但 LDO 长期因 TEV Yield 为 0% 而被诟病缺乏价值捕获，此次回购虽金额相对市值 $244.3M 不算巨大，却标志着治理代币开始通过国库盈余反哺自身价值。这一举措不仅优化了资产负债表，更打破了“收入不归代币”的悲观预期，为 LDO 赋予了实质性的基本面支撑。

proposals.title: From LNOSG to CMC: Evolving Curated Staking Modules Governance
proposals.summary_en: The proposal introduces the Curated Module Committee (CMC) as a dedicated body to handle the day-to-day operations of Lido’s Curated Modules in light of the upcoming Curated Module v2 (CMv2). The CMC is proposed to be granted governance authority ove
proposals.summary_zh: The proposal introduces the Curated Module Committee (CMC) as a dedicated body to handle the day-to-day operations of Lido’s Curated Modules in light of the upcoming Curated Module v2 (CMv2). The CMC is proposed to be granted governance authority ove

proposals.title: Redirect DVT & APM Incentives to Current Meta Treasury and LoL
proposals.summary_en: This proposal aims to formalize the change in destination and utilization of post-Node Operator share of DVT incentives and APM incentives flows, and seeks DAO approval to:.
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案旨在正式变更DVT激励和APM激励的节点运营商份额流向及用途，并寻求DAO于2023年X月X日批准：
proposals.analysis_zh:
Lido 拟将 DVT 及 APM 激励转入 Lido Earn 金库，支持 ETH 收益策略。

该提案建议将 Obol 和 SSV Network 产生的 DVT 激励及 APM 激励，从 Decentralized Validator Vault 转向 Lido Earn Current Meta Treasury 多重签名钱包，以支持 Lido Earn ETH 金库策略。尽管 Lido 坐拥 $18.99B 的 TVL 和 $78.6M 年收入，LDO 代币本身仍无收入分配机制，此次资金流向调整仅属于国库资金运作的战术优化。这种“左倒右手”式的资金重新分配虽有助于提升资金利用效率并丰富收益产品，但并未触及代币价值捕获的核心痛点，持有者无法从中获得直接财务回报。

proposals.title: Introduce an Identified DVT Cluster type in the Community Staking Module
proposals.summary_en: This proposal introduces a new CSM Node Operator type — Identified DVT Cluster (IDVTC) — allowing groups of 4 Identified Community Stakers (ICS) to run validators collaboratively using DVT. The design combines the trust guarantees of ICS with the res
proposals.summary_zh:
引入社区质押模块中的已识别DVT集群类型

本提案引入一种新的社区质押节点运营商类型——已识别DVT集群（IDVTC），允许4个已识别社区质押者（ICS）协作使用DVT运行验证器。该设计结合了ICS的信任保证与DVT的冗余和可扩展性。

proposals.title: Lido DAO Ops Multisigs Policy 3.0
proposals.summary_en: Operating DAO-related processes requires striking a balance between flexibility and security. Lido DAO and the Lido protocol are governed by tokenholder voting, while Safe multisig wallets are used to execute a broad set of delegated functions, helpi
proposals.summary_zh:
协议：Lido
标题：Lido DAO 运营多重签名政策 3.0
摘要：Lido DAO 和协议治理依赖代币持有者投票，同时使用 Safe 多重签名钱包执行委托功能，以在灵活性与安全性之间取得平衡。

proposals.title: Increase Lido Alliance BORG Operational Easy Track Limits to align with EGG
proposals.summary_en: The Lido Alliance BORG Foundation (the "Foundation") proposes raising the Easy Track limits governing transfers to the Lido Alliance BORG Foundation operational multisig to $5M per 6-month period (vs. current $250K per 3-month period) to reflect the
proposals.summary_zh: Lido联盟BORG基金会提议将管理Lido联盟BORG基金会操作多签账户的Easy Track限额从每3个月250K美元提升至每6个月500万美元，以适应EGG。

proposals.title: Integrate Lido into the Galaxy Challenge Game 🚀
proposals.summary_en: Galaxy Challenge is a skill-based Web3 arcade game where players pilot a starship, dodge crypto coins, and survive waves of increasing difficulty. We propose integrating Lido (stETH/wstETH) as a supported deposit & reward token.
proposals.summary_zh: Galaxy Challenge（Web3 街机游戏）提议集成 Lido 的 stETH/wstETH 作为存取款和奖励代币。注意：这是第三方社区提案。

proposals.title: Delegate Incentivization Program 2.0
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks DAO approval to make the Delegate Incentivization Program a standing governance mechanism, funded under the approved 2026 EGG request. The proposed program is designed to auto-renew annually, pay delegates in USD-denominated stabl
proposals.summary_zh: 将委托人激励计划 2.0 设为 Lido DAO 常设治理机制，由 2026 年 EGG 拨款资助，自动年度续期，以美元稳定币支付委托人报酬。

proposals.title: Authorize $5M DAO Treasury Allocation to Lido Earn ETH and USD Vaults
proposals.summary_en: This proposal requests a "skin-in-the-game" one-time $5M DAO Treasury allocation (requested in stETH equivalent) into the planned new Lido Earn vaults: Lido Earn ETH Vault and Lido Earn USD Vault. The purpose of this allocation is to:.
proposals.summary_zh: 申请 500 万美元 DAO 国库拨款（以 stETH 等值）投入即将推出的 Lido Earn ETH 和 USD 金库，展示 DAO 的「利益绑定」承诺。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Lido DAO 拟投入 $5M 国库资金至 Lido Earn 金库，确立与用户利益捆绑。

Lido DAO 提议从国库划拨 $5M（以 stETH 计价）注入 Lido Earn ETH 和 USD Vault，旨在通过 "skin-in-the-game" 机制将治理层利益与用户深度绑定。虽然 LDO 目前 TEV Yield 为 0% 且仅作为治理代币存在，但面对 $78.6M 的年收入和 $21.48B 的 TVL，此举标志着 DAO 开始主动寻求国库资金的有效利用而非单纯囤积。这 $5M 的种子资金若能跑通新收益模型，不仅能验证 Lido Earn 的可行性，更可能为 LDO 持有者开辟间接的价值捕获渠道，打破治理代币“零收益”的僵局。

proposals.title: Should Stakin continue in the Curated and DVT sets following its acquisition by The Tie?
proposals.summary_en: Allow Stakin by The Tie to continue Node Operations in Lido on Ethereum and approve updating the Curated NO Registry on-chain to change the NO’s name to "Stakin by The Tie" and update its reward address as requested.
proposals.summary_zh: 因 Stakin 被 The Tie 收购，投票决定是否允许其继续在 Lido on Ethereum 运营节点，并批准更新链上注册表的名称和奖励地址。

proposals.title: Rewards Share Committee Reform
proposals.summary_en: Reform and relaunch the Rewards Share Committee (”Committee”) as DAO-authorized operational committee to align with GOOSE-3 goals. This proposal updates the Committee mandate and process, including adding support of the stVaults which were introduced
proposals.summary_zh: 改革并重启奖励分享委员会，作为 DAO 授权的运营委员会，对齐 GOOSE-3 战略目标，新增对 Lido V3 stVaults 的管理支持。

proposals.title: DVT & DVV Incentive Allocation Changes
proposals.summary_en: This proposal introduces a variable incentive allocation model for Distributed Validator Technology (DVT) incentives accrued to the Lido protocol, split between Node Operators and the Mellow Distributed Validator Vault (DVV). The proposed new mechani
proposals.summary_zh: 引入分布式验证技术（DVT）激励的可变分配模型：在节点运营商和 Mellow 分布式验证金库（DVV）之间动态分配激励。

proposals.title: GOOSE 2025 cycle: Lido DAO goals for 2026
proposals.summary_en: GOOSE (Guided Open Objective Setting Exercise) is a framework establishing the open yearly process designed for the Lido DAO to pick a set of short- and medium-term goals. During the 2025 GOOSE proposal window, only one proposal for the upcoming 2026
proposals.summary_zh: GOOSE 是 Lido DAO 年度目标设定框架。2025 年提案窗口中仅收到一项 2026 年战略目标提案（GOOSE-3），将 Lido 横向扩展至新产品线。

proposals.title: Ecosystem Grant gRequest (EGG): Executing GOOSE-3
proposals.summary_en: This 2026 Ecosystem Grant gRequest (“EGG”) sets out the funding required to execute GOOSE-3 strategic plan for 2026 to support the Lido DAO (the “DAO”) in furthering the Lido protocol (“Lido” or “Protocol”).
proposals.summary_zh: 2026 年 Lido 生态拨款申请（EGG），列出执行 GOOSE-3 战略计划所需的全部资金需求，支持 Lido DAO 推进协议发展和新产品线建设。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Lido 整合多方资源发起 GOOSE-3 战略资助，备战 2026 强化协议韧性。

Lido DAO 提交 2026 Ecosystem Grant gRequest (EGG) 旨在执行 GOOSE-3 战略计划，整合 Lido Labs Foundation 等多方资源以确保协议韧性与金库增长。尽管 Lido 坐拥 $21.48B 的 TVL，但 LDO 作为治理代币 TEV Yield 为 0%，此次拨款虽能巩固其 $264.1M 市值的护城河，却再次回避了代币持有者的价值捕获问题。在年收入 $78.6M 的背景下，资金若仅用于行政与安全维护而非拓展收入来源，长期恐削弱社区对治理价值的信心，毕竟高 TVL 背后的安全责任远比单纯的生态扩张更为紧迫。

proposals.title: Lido Alliance BORG – Amendment of Bylaws to Enable GOOSE-3 Execution
proposals.summary_en: - GOOSE-3 proposes the horizontal expansion of the Lido DAO into new products and business lines. - The current bylaws of Lido Alliance BORG are narrowly drafted and restrict its purpose to the Lido Alliance Program.
proposals.summary_zh: 修改 Lido Alliance BORG 章程以支持 GOOSE-3 执行。GOOSE-3 提议 Lido DAO 横向扩展至新产品和业务线，但当前章程限制了扩展范围。

proposals.title: Adopt The SEAL Safe Harbor Agreement
proposals.summary_en: does not request any funds from Lido DAO and does not involve any budget allocation. It solely seeks governance approval for Lido DAO to adopt the SEAL Whitehat Safe Harbor Agreement.
proposals.summary_zh: 本提案不涉及任何资金，仅寻求治理批准 Lido DAO 采纳 SEAL 白帽安全港协议，为安全研究者提供法律保护框架。

proposals.title: MIP 131 - Allocation of a Grant for the Morpho Association’s Strategic Support Program (2026-2030)
proposals.summary_en: The Morpho Association (the “Association”) is requesting from the MORPHO token-holding community (the “DAO”) an allocation of a financial grant of 150M MORPHO, to support the Association’s mission to develop and promote the Morpho network over a mult
proposals.summary_zh: Morpho 协议治理提案：MIP 131 - 2026-2030 年战略支持项目资助分配（150M MORPHO）提案，请求 DAO 社区为 Morpho 协会资助 150M MORPHO，以支持协会发展及推广 Morpho 网络。

proposals.title: MIP 130 - MORPHO Incentives on Tempo
proposals.summary_en: MIP 130 - MORPHO Incentives on Tempo
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 130 - 在 Tempo 上实施 Morpho 激励计划

proposals.title: MIP 129 - Approve Review of 2025 Contributor Grants
proposals.summary_en: Ratify the previously authorized 2025 Morpho contributor grants distribution.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 129：批准 2025 年 Morpho 贡献者拨款分配审核结果，确认此前授权的拨款方案。
proposals.analysis_zh:
MIP 129 追认 2025 年贡献者资助，虽保障团队运营但加剧无收益代币的抛压风险。

Morpho 坐拥 $6.98B TVL 和 $733.5M 市值，但 MORPHO 仍为 TEV Yield 0% 的纯治理代币。MIP 129 仅是走流程追认已授权的 2025 年贡献者资助，虽能确保团队稳定，却在代币价值捕获缺失的背景下，变相增加市场抛压。协议基本面强劲与代币缺乏赋能之间的割裂愈发明显，若长期维持“零收益”现状，仅靠治理权无法支撑估值，投资者需警惕高 TVL 并未转化为持币者回报的风险。

proposals.title: MIP 128 - Lite App Deprecation Part 2
proposals.summary_en: MIP 128 - Lite App Deprecation Part 2
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 128：Lite App 弃用第二部分，继续推进 Morpho Lite 应用下线流程。

proposals.title: MIP 127 - External Grants Rewards Framework
proposals.summary_en: Amend the optimistic rewards framework to account for external tokens grants.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 127：修改乐观奖励框架以纳入外部代币拨款（如 Optimism、Arbitrum 等生态激励），扩展奖励来源。

proposals.title: MIP 126 - List MorphoMarketV1AdapterV2 in Morpho Registry
proposals.summary_en: List MorphoMarketV1Adapter in Morpho’s Registry.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 126：将 MorphoMarketV1AdapterV2 列入 Morpho 注册表，支持旧版市场的兼容性适配。

proposals.title: MIP 125 - Lite App Deprecation
proposals.summary_en: MIP 125 - Lite App Deprecation
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 125：Lite App 弃用第一部分，开始 Morpho Lite 应用的逐步下线流程。

proposals.title: MIP 124 - Vault V2 Specific Incentive Campaign
proposals.summary_en: Introduce a dedicated incentive campaign to accelerate migration from Vault V1 to Vault V2, governed under the Optimistic Rewards Framework.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 124：引入专项激励活动加速 Vault V1 向 V2 迁移，受乐观奖励框架管辖，推动用户迁移至新版本。

proposals.title: MIP 123 - Spark Olympics Adjustment
proposals.summary_en: MIP 123 - Spark Olympics Adjustment
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 123：Spark Olympics 活动参数调整。

proposals.title: MIP 122 - Validate and Execute Morpho Adaptors Migration Plan
proposals.summary_en: MIP 122 - Validate and Execute Morpho Adaptors Migration Plan
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 122：验证并执行 Morpho 适配器迁移计划，将旧版适配器升级至新架构。

proposals.title: MIP 121 -- Aave v3 Optimizer Full Deprecation
proposals.summary_en: Fully deprecate the Aave v3 Optimizer, rendering all outstanding borrow positions (approximately $230k) liquidatable and ensuring all lenders can withdraw. Liquidation losses triggered by the deprecation to be reimbursed by the Morpho Association for
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 121：完全弃用 Aave v3 Optimizer，使约 23 万美元未偿借款头寸可被清算。弃用导致的清算损失由 Morpho Association 补偿受影响用户。

proposals.title: MIP 120 - Optimizers Deprecation Final Phase
proposals.summary_en: Fully deprecate the Aave v2 and Compound v2 optimizer instances.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 120：Optimizer 弃用最终阶段，完全下线 Aave v2 和 Compound v2 优化器实例。

proposals.title: MIP 119 - Spark Rewards Update
proposals.summary_en: Adjust AMO rules to apply the same standard MORPHO reward rate to any depositor that deposits any asset eligible under MIP 102 and MIP 109. This means that an asset like USDC will earn rewards even if deposited by a DAO like Spark, while AMO exclusio
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 119：调整 AMO 规则，对所有符合 MIP 102/109 条件的存款统一适用标准 MORPHO 奖励率，包括 Spark 等 DAO 的存款。

proposals.title: MIP 118 - MORPHO Token Deployment and Incentives on Hyperliquid
proposals.summary_en: Deploy the MORPHO token on HyperEVM using LayerZero, and authorize an initial incentives budget of 100k MORPHO.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 118：通过 LayerZero 在 HyperEVM（Hyperliquid 生态）上部署 MORPHO 代币，并授权 10 万 MORPHO 初始激励预算。

proposals.title: MIP 117 - Arbitrum Rewards Extension
proposals.summary_en: MIP 117 - Arbitrum Rewards Extension
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 117：延长 Arbitrum 上 MORPHO 奖励激励计划的时间。

proposals.title: MIP 116 - Unichain Rewards Extension
proposals.summary_en: MIP 116 - Unichain Rewards Extension
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 116：延长 Unichain 上 MORPHO 奖励激励计划的时间。

proposals.title: MIP 115 - Spark USDC Deposit Rewards 3
proposals.summary_en: To support lending supply growth as the Coinbase borrow integration scales, authorize 50% of the standard MORPHO reward rate for Spark USDC deposits in the markets integrated by Coinbase on total deposits up to $1B.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 115：为支持 Coinbase 借贷集成扩展，对 Spark USDC 存款给予标准 MORPHO 奖励率的 50%，总存款上限 10 亿美元。

proposals.title: MIP 114 - Incentives Distribution on Arbitrum
proposals.summary_en: MIP 114 - Incentives Distribution on Arbitrum
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 114：在 Arbitrum 上分配 MORPHO 激励，推动该链上的 Morpho 借贷市场增长。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Morpho 拟向 Arbitrum 分发 13.5 万枚 MORPHO，开启跨链流动性激励。

Morpho DAO 提出 MIP 114 提案，计划向 Arbitrum 网络分发高达 13.5 万枚 MORPHO 代币，旨在通过流动性激励扩张生态版图。当前 MORPHO 仅作为纯治理代币，TEV Yield 为 0%，此次激励虽不直接改变代币价值捕获逻辑，但标志着项目从单纯治理向生态增长迈出关键一步。考虑到其 TVL 已达 $6.98B，在 Arbitrum 这一 DeFi 热土投放激励，若配合 Optimistic Rewards Framework 高效执行，有望短期内提升资金效率与市场份额，但需警惕激励结束后资金留存率及对代币抛压的潜在影响。

proposals.title: MIP 113 - Select LayerZero OFT to Bridge Morpho Token on Arbitrum
proposals.summary_en: represents the first operational step in a broader multichain vision for Morpho token bridging, one that may eventually standardize LayerZero as Morpho’s cross-chain bridge infrastructure.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 113：选择 LayerZero OFT 标准桥接 MORPHO 代币至 Arbitrum，这是 Morpho 多链代币桥接愿景的首个运营步骤。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Morpho 借力 LayerZero 跨链 Arbitrum，迈出多链治理关键一步

Morpho DAO 提出 MIP 113，计划采用 LayerZero OFT 标准将治理代币 MORPHO 扩展至 Arbitrum。鉴于 Morpho TVL 高达 $6.98B，跨链不仅能捕捉 L2 流动性，更是其多链愿景的实质性落地。技术上采用 L1 锁定/释放与 L2 铸造/销毁模式，

proposals.title: MIP 112 - OP Grant Allocation for USDC Growth on Base
proposals.summary_en: The Morpho Association proposes to allocate 200,000 OP tokens from the Optimism Council Grant Cycle 33 to incentivize USDC growth on Base, targeting an additional $5M TVL increase to satisfy the grant criteria.
proposals.summary_zh: MIP 112：将 Optimism Council 第 33 轮拨款的 20 万 OP 代币用于激励 Base 上 USDC 增长，目标新增 500 万美元 TVL。

proposals.title: Should Compound Contribute to the DeFi United Recovery Effort?
proposals.summary_en:
published on April 27 (linked here) outlines a potential Compound contribution structured in two parts:  
 Part A: approximately 1,857 ETH that may be satisfied through recovery of the attacker's position on Compound, contingent on restoration of rsE
proposals.summary_zh: 《应Compound参与DeFi联合复苏努力吗？》提案于4月27日发布，提出Compound以两部分方式贡献力量：A部分：约1857 ETH，可通过恢复攻击者在Compound的仓位实现，前提是rsE恢复。

proposals.title: [Temperature Check] Compound Blue Deprecation
proposals.summary_en: We are seeking to gauge community support for the proposed plan to deprecate Compound Blue.
proposals.summary_zh: 温度检查：征求社区对弃用 Compound Blue（Morpho 上的 Compound 借贷优化器）计划的支持。

proposals.title: Adopt Optimistic Governance for Market Parameter Updates
proposals.summary_en: Following Tally's successful RFP response to become Compound's Voting Service Provider, we explored visibility improvements for MarketAdmin transactions. However, consultations revealed that MarketAdmin represents a suboptimal operational model with
proposals.summary_zh: Tally 成为 Compound 投票服务商后，探索 MarketAdmin 交易透明度改进。但协商发现 MarketAdmin 是次优运营模式，提议采用乐观治理替代。

proposals.title: [Temperature Check] Compound V2 Deprecation
proposals.summary_en: We are seeking to gauge community support for the proposed plan to deprecate Compound V2.
proposals.summary_zh: 温度检查：征求社区对弃用 Compound V2 旧版借贷协议计划的支持。

proposals.title: Adopt an OEV Solution on Mantle (2025 RFP)
proposals.summary_en: This Snapshot is part of the Compound DAO’s 2025 OEV (Oracle Extractable Value) RFP process. Delegates are asked to select whether to adopt an OEV solution for all 10 of the chains that Compound currently resides on, with this vote focusing on MANTLE
proposals.summary_zh: Compound DAO 2025 OEV RFP 流程——MANTLE 链投票：是否采用 OEV 解决方案。

proposals.summary_zh: Compound DAO 2025 OEV RFP 流程——UNICHAIN 链投票：是否采用 OEV 解决方案。

proposals.title: Authorizing the CGWG to Facilitate RFPs
proposals.summary_en: (RFP) process for evaluating competing initiatives. The Compound Governance WG (CGWG) has stepped in to facilitate several such RFPs on an ad-hoc basis.
proposals.summary_zh: 授权 Compound 治理工作组（CGWG）正式推动 RFP 流程，此前 CGWG 已临时推动多项 RFP。

proposals.title: ether.fi DAO Proposal: Treasury Contribution to restore rsETH's backing
proposals.summary_en: This proposal authorises the Foundation to deploy 5,000 ETH from the DAO treasury as ether.fi's contribution to a coordinated, cross-protocol remediation effort following the recent rsETH exploit. ether.fi is working alongside Aave and other DeFi eco
proposals.summary_zh: ether.fi DAO提案：将5,000 ETH从DAO财库划拨至ether.fi，以支持针对近期rsETH攻击的跨协议修复行动。ether.fi将与Aave和其他DeFi生态系统合作伙伴共同努力。

proposals.title: Ether.Fi DAO Proposal: Treasury Deployment for ETHFI Buy-Back Program
proposals.summary_en: This proposal authorises the Foundation to utilise a portion of the treasury to conduct buy-backs of ETHFI tokens while the market price is below US $3, up to a total amount of US $50 million. The goal is to continue to accumulate ETHFI and increase
proposals.summary_zh: 授权基金会在 ETHFI 市价低于 3 美元时动用国库资金回购代币，总额上限 5000 万美元，目标持续积累 ETHFI 并提升代币价值。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Ether.fi 拟动用 $5000 万国库资金在 $3 以下回购，强力托底并提升代币价值捕获。

Ether.fi 提案授权基金会在价格低于 $3 时动用国库资金回购 ETHFI，总额上限 $5000 万，这笔资金约占当前 $497.6M 市值的 10%，托底意图极其明显。相比仅靠 $56.8M 年收入支撑的常规回购，此次直接动用国库“存粮”能更迅速地改善供需关系，此前提案 #8 和 #10 已验证其有效性。在 $6.44B 的 TVL 基础上，项目方选择在低价区间主动积累 ETHFI，不仅护盘坚决，更向市场传递了对长期价值的强烈信心，远比

proposals.title: ether.fi Member Rewards
proposals.summary_en: After five successful seasons that have driven substantial growth and established ether.fi as a leading protocol in the liquid staking and restaking ecosystem, we are announcing the conclusion of our traditional Seasonal program. Over the past season
proposals.summary_zh: 在五个成功赛季后宣布传统季节性激励计划结束，转向新的「会员奖励」持续激励模式。ether.fi 已成为流动质押/再质押生态领先协议。

proposals.title: #11 Ether.fi DAO Proposal - Withdrawal Revenue Buyback Program
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks approval to repurpose revenue generated by the eETH withdrawal queue towards ETHFI token buybacks. ether.fi generates revenue on the withdraw process through two different mechanisms - normal withdrawals forfeit yields during the
proposals.summary_zh: 将 eETH 提款队列产生的收入用于 ETHFI 代币回购。ether.fi 通过正常提款（放弃等待期收益）和快速提款两种机制产生提款收入。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Ether.fi 提现收入转战回购，预计为 ETHFI 持有者带来约 2.5% 年化收益。

Ether.fi DAO 提议将 eETH 提现队列产生的收入（包括普通提现的收益没收和快速提现的 0.3% 手续费）重新用于 ETHFI 代币回购。虽然项目年总收入达 $56.8M，但此次针对提现收入的回购规模约 $15M，相对于 $497.6M 的市值贡献了约 2.5% 的年化收益。这一举措将协议收入与代币价值直接挂钩，有效减少了流通供应，是对“价值捕获”能力的实质性提升，不过在 TVL 高达 $6.44B 的背景下，回购力度仍有提升空间，需持续观察后续执行效果。

proposals.title: #10 - ETHFI DAO Proposal: Season 5
proposals.summary_en: Following the success of Season 4, this proposal recommends the allocation of 10 million ETHFI tokens for Season 5 (S5), designed to drive strategic growth, accelerate momentum and participation, and expand the ether.fi ecosystem across multiple dime
proposals.summary_zh: 延续前四季成功，为第五季（S5）分配 1000 万 ETHFI 代币，用于推动战略增长、加速社区参与和扩展 ether.fi 生态。

proposals.title: #9 - Proposal: Diversification of ETHFI DAO Treasury through Investment in Real-World Assets
proposals.summary_en: This proposal, following the passing of the ether.fi protocol revenue distribution to staked ETHFI holders, seeks approval to diversify the ETHFI DAO treasury by investing in a mix of real-world assets such as tokenized treasury notes, along with ETH
proposals.summary_zh: 在协议收入分配给 ETHFI 质押者的提案通过后，提议投资代币化国债和 ETH 等资产多元化 DAO 国库，降低单一资产风险。
proposals.analysis_zh:
ETHFI DAO 拟动用 1800 万枚代币投资 RWA 及主流资产，旨在降低风险并提升资金库收益。

ether.fi 在落实协议收入分配后，进一步提议动用高达 1800 万枚 ETHFI 投资代币化国债、ETH 和 BTC。当前协议年收入 $56.8M，TEV Yield 达 4.37%，此时进行资金库多元化是极具前瞻性的财务操作。与其被动持有单一资产，引入 RWA 和主流资产不仅能有效对冲市场波动风险，还能通过无风险利率增厚 DAO 资金库底仓，为后续生态发展提供更稳定的现金流支持，长远看利好 ETHFI 的价值捕获能力。

proposals.title: #8 Ether.Fi DAO Proposal: Enhancing ETHFI Utility and Liquidity with Protocol Rebates for Governance Participants
proposals.summary_en: This proposal builds upon the success of Ether.Fi’s buyback and liquidity provision (LP) program by introducing a new revenue-sharing mechanism for ETHFI stakers. We propose allocating 5% of protocol revenue to buy ETHFI and distribute it to ETHFI st
proposals.summary_zh: 在回购和 LP 提供成功基础上引入新的收入分享机制：分配 5% 协议收入购买 ETHFI 代币并分配给质押者，直接的代币价值回馈。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Ether.Fi 提议新增 5% 协议收入用于回购分发，直接提升 ETHFI 质押收益率。

Ether.Fi DAO 计划在现有回购机制基础上，新增 5% 协议收入用于回购 ETHFI 并分发给质押者。当前年收入 $56.8M，此举预计每年额外注入约 $2.84M 价值，叠加现有的 TEV Yield 4.37%，进一步巩固了 ETHFI 作为生息资产的吸引力。尽管 TVL 高达 $6.44B，但代币市值仅 $497.6M，该机制能有效将

proposals.title: #7 - ETHFI DAO Proposal: Season 4 ETHFI allocation
proposals.summary_en: This proposal recommends that the Ether.fi DAO allocates an additional 4,000,000 ETHFI tokens for use in Season 4 (S4). The primary purpose of this allocation is to incentivize new promotions and deposits during the season.
proposals.summary_zh: 为第四季（S4）额外分配 400 万 ETHFI 代币，用于激励新用户推广和存款活动。
proposals.analysis_zh:
ETHFI 增拨 400 万代币用于 Season 4 激励，短期稀释风险换取 TVL 增长预期。

Ether.fi DAO 提议增拨 400 万枚 ETHFI 用于 Season 4 激励，试图在 TVL 已达 $5.99B

proposals.title: #6 - ETHFI DAO Proposal: Incentives on Centralized Exchanges
proposals.summary_en: ether.fi proposes an allocation of up to 10 million ETHFI tokens to be used specifically for listing Wrapped eETH (weETH) as collateral on centralized exchanges (CEX) for perpetual trading. This allocation will directly support the growth and adoptio
proposals.summary_zh: 分配最多 1000 万 ETHFI 代币，专用于将 weETH 作为 CEX 永续合约交易抵押品上线，促进 weETH 在中心化交易所的采用。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO Proposal: Seasonal Rewards and LRT²
proposals.summary_en: Following the success of ether.fi season 1, 2 and 3, ether.fi proposes extending the seasons initiative with the introduction of season 4, targeted at fostering community engagement and support in the restaking space, while continuing to support the
proposals.summary_zh: 延续前三季成功推出第四季，目标促进社区参与和再质押空间支持，同时引入 LRT²（二次再质押）概念。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO Proposal: Increase to Buyback and LP Seeding Allocation
proposals.summary_en: This proposal aims to increase the monthly buyback of ETHFI tokens from the current maximum of 5% to 25%. Additionally, it seeks to utilize liquidity provisioning through Arrakis Finance.
proposals.summary_zh: 将 ETHFI 月度回购比例从最高 5% 大幅提升至 25%，并利用 Arrakis Finance 进行链上流动性提供。
proposals.analysis_zh:
ETHFI 月度回购上限由 5% 提至 25%，协议收入转化为代币价值的效率将显著提升。

Ether.fi 坐拥 $6.44B TVL 和 $56.8M 年收入，基本面强劲，此次将月度回购上限从 5% 激增至 25%，意味着更多现金流将直接用于回购 ETHFI，大幅强化了代币的价值捕获能力。结合 Arrakis Finance 进行流动性管理，此举在提升 TEV Yield（当前约 4.37%）的同时优化了交易深度。尽管激进回购在市场波动期存在执行风险，但这显示了 DAO 将真金白银回馈持有者的决心，相比单纯积累国库，这是更高效的资本配置方式。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO Proposal: Staking Contract Implementation
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks approval for the deployment of a staking contract for ETHFI on Ethereum mainnet. The ETHFI staking mechanism aims to provide genuine utility by linking rewards to governance participation and effective balances in the ecosystem.
proposals.summary_zh: 在以太坊主网部署 ETHFI 质押合约，通过将奖励与治理参与和生态有效余额挂钩，为代币提供实际效用。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO proposal: Season 3 and airdrop token allocation
proposals.summary_en: will not only reward our community members for their continued participation and support, but also incentivize future engagement and growth within the ether.fi ecosystem. We kindly request your thoughtful consideration and participation in the voting
proposals.summary_zh: 第三季和空投代币分配提案，奖励社区成员持续参与并激励未来参与和 ether.fi 生态增长。

proposals.title: ETHFI DAO Proposal: ETHFI Buyback and Liquidity Pool Seeding
proposals.summary_en: This proposal suggests initiating the purchase of ETHFI with up to 50% of protocol revenue. Initially 5% of monthly revenue will be used, with future increases to be put to a community vote.
proposals.summary_zh: 启动 ETHFI 回购和流动性池注入计划：初始使用 5% 月度协议收入购买 ETHFI，最高可提升至 50%，后续提升需社区投票。
proposals.analysis_zh:
ETHFI 拟将 50% 收入上限用于回购，初期仅 5% 试水，长期提振代币价值。

ether.fi 提议将协议收入的 50% 上限用于回购 ETHFI，相比当前约 30% 的分配比例大幅提升，若全额执行年回购额理论上可达 $28.4M。然而初期仅动用 5% 月收入试水，态度略显保守，虽能逐步在 Curve 建立流动性并充实国库，但对市值 $497.6M 的 ETHFI 而言，短期买盘力度有限，难以迅速拉高 TEV Yield。此举虽确立了代币价值捕获机制，但在 TVL 高达 $6.44B 的背景下，执行节奏才是决定市场预期的关键，若后续社区投票能快速提升比例，才算真正兑现“收益型资产”的潜力。

proposals.title: Ethena Risk Committee Elections - Fourth Term
proposals.summary_en: Following the conclusion of the application period, we are pleased to present the final list of shortlisted candidates for the Risk Committee election. As the recent vote to reduce Risk Committee members from 5 to 3 passed with 100% in favour, 3 succ
proposals.summary_zh: Ethena 风险委员会第四届选举。此前投票已将委员会规模从 5 人缩减至 3 人（100% 赞成），本轮从入围候选人中选出 3 名新成员。

proposals.title: Proposal: Reduction of Risk Committee members from 5 to 3

proposals.summary_en: Following the conclusion of the application period, we are pleased to present the final list of shortlisted candidates for the Risk Committee election. 6 successful candidates out of the 7 applicants will earn a seat on the Ethena Risk Committee for
proposals.summary_zh: Ethena 风险委员会第三届选举，7 名申请者中选出 6 名成员组成新一届委员会。

proposals.title: Proposal: Ethena lending in Aave
proposals.summary_en: This proposal seeks to improve the capital efficiency of the backing assets of USDe by utilizing a portion of the idle USDtb, USDC and/or USDT in the backing as lending collateral on Aave.
proposals.summary_zh: 提议将 USDe 支撑资产中的闲置 USDtb、USDC 和/或 USDT 用作 Aave 借贷抵押品，提升 Ethena 储备资产的资本效率。

proposals.title: Updated: Ethena Risk Committee Elections - February 2025
proposals.summary_en: Note: This vote has been updated to account for locked sENA

proposals.title: # [Ethereum] Spark Treasury - Spark Foundation and Spark Assets Foundation Grants for Q2 2026
proposals.summary_en:
>
> - Spark Foundation Grant
>   - Recipient address: 0x92e4629a4510AF5819d7D1601464C233599fF5ec
>   - Transfer amount: 1,100,000 USDS
> - Spark Asset Foundation Grant
>   - Recipient address: 0xEabCb8C0346Ac072437362f1692706BA5768A911
>   - Transfer
proposals.summary_zh: Spark Foundation 和 Spark Asset Foundation 2026 年 Q2 拨款：分别转账 110 万 USDS 和指定金额，用于运营和资产管理。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Spark 申请 330 万 USDS 运营拨款，代币价值捕获依然为零

Phoenix Labs 提议为 Spark Foundation 申请 Q2 运营拨款，总计 330 万 USDS。虽然 Spark 拥有 $4.88B 的 TVL 和 $23.6M 的年收入，但这些资金仅流向 Sky 主 DAO，SPK 代币目前 TEV Yield 为 0%。此次拨款占年收入的约 14%，对于 SubDAO 而言运营成本偏高。在没有收入分红机制的情况下，持续的国库支出仅维持了协议运转，却稀释了 SPK 作为治理资产的价值积累潜力，代币持有者仍处于“用爱发电”的尴尬境地。

proposals.title: [Ethereum] Spark Treasury - Transfer SparkLend DAI and SparkLend USDS from SubDAO Proxy to ALM Proxy
proposals.summary_en:
>
> - Transfer all SparkLend DAI and SparkLend USDS from the SubDAO Proxy to ALM Proxy.
proposals.summary_zh: 将 SubDAO Proxy 中的所有 SparkLend DAI 和 USDS 资产转移至 ALM Proxy，统一流动性管理。
proposals.analysis_zh:
Spark 将储备金划转至 ALM Proxy，修正资本效率短板但未触及代币价值捕获。

该提案计划将 SparkLend 的 DAI 和 USDS 储备从 SubDAO Proxy 移交 ALM Proxy 管理，旨在解决 2025 年末资金划转后未计入风险资本的遗留问题。尽管 Spark 拥有 $4.88B 的 TVL 和 $23.6M 年收入，此次调整能优化资产负债表并提升资金利用率，属于必要的运营维护。然而，对于 SPK 持有者而言，这种后台“记账式”优化并无实质红利，鉴于当前 TEV Yield 为 0% 且收入流向 Sky 主 DAO，治理代币依然无法捕获协议增长的财务价值，SubDAO 的独立性在财务回报上显得苍白无力。

Mantle 拟分阶段销毁 3-8% 国库 MNT，强力注入通缩预期。

Mantle 发起国库 MNT 销毁提案，计划在 12 至 24 个月内销毁总供应量的 3% 至 8%。鉴于当前 TEV Yield 为 0% 且无直接收益分配，此举成为项目方回馈持有者的核心手段。对于市值 $1.98B 的 Mantle 而言，销毁规模相当可观，若能足额执行，将显著改善代币供需关系。这不仅是简单的通缩操作，更是国库管理效率的试金石，有望打破 L2 代币缺乏价值捕获的刻板印象，为 MNT 提供强有力的价格支撑。

proposals.analysis_zh:
推动 mETH 需求以巩固国库安全，但 MNT 持有者当前仍面临 TEV Yield 为 0% 的窘境。

该提案旨在通过增强 mETH 的市场需求来巩固 Mantle 国库的安全性，虽然 MNT 市值已达 $1.98B，但当前 TEV Yield 仍为 0%，且 TEV 机制尚待确认，意味着代币持有者目前无法从生态增长中获得直接财务回报。提案侧重于通过 mETH 扩大生态护城河而非短期分润，这种策略在牛市中虽能推高 TVL，但缺乏明确的 Gas 消耗返还或质押奖励机制，使得 MNT 的价值捕获能力显得薄弱，投资者需警惕“增长不增收”的风险。

proposals.analysis_zh:
Mantle 通过 MIP-26 动用国库资产扶持应用生态，意在以资金换增长。

MIP-26 提案获批标志着 Mantle 正式授权利用国库资产支持应用层发展，试图打破当前 TEV Yield 为 0% 的僵局。虽然年收入数据缺失，但依托 $1.98B 的市值体量，Mantle 选择将雄厚的资金储备转化为生态护城河，此举意在解决“富国库、弱应用”的结构性痛点。通过向优质协议注入流动性，协议有望直接刺激 TVL 增长并提升链上活跃度，虽然短期内面临国库资产消耗风险，但相比被动持币，这种主动出击的策略更能通过生态繁荣反哺 MNT 的长期价值捕获能力。
